name: Device Compliance Drift
description: Queries Intune device compliance state on demand, surfaces non-compliant devices by policy, department, or user, and explains what specific compliance checks are failing. Ask me about compliance drift, failing policies, or devices in grace period.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: How many devices are currently non-compliant and what are the top failure reasons?
Show me all Windows devices in Engineering that are non-compliant
Which users have devices in grace period that will expire in the next 7 days?
What is the overall compliance rate across our device estate?
